gxio/usb_dev.h File Reference

An API for manipulating the USB device shim. More...


Data Structures

struct  gxio_usb_dev_context_t
 A context object used to manage USB hardware resources. More...

Functions

int gxio_usb_dev_init (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context, int usb_index)
 Initialize a USB device context.
int gxio_usb_dev_destroy (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context)
 Destroy a USB device context.
void gxio_usb_dev_read_rx_fifo (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context, int ep, void *dest, int len)
 Read data from an endpoint's receive FIFO.
void gxio_usb_dev_write_tx_fifo (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context, int ep, void *src, int len)
 Write data to an endpoint's transmit FIFO.
unsigned int gxio_usb_dev_get_in_ctrl (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context, int ep)
 Get the value of an endpoint's input control register.
void gxio_usb_dev_set_in_ctrl (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context, int ep, unsigned int val)
 Set the value of an endpoint's input control register.
unsigned int gxio_usb_dev_get_in_sts (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context, int ep)
 Get the value of an endpoint's input status register.
void gxio_usb_dev_set_in_sts (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context, int ep, unsigned int val)
 Set the value of an endpoint's input status register.
unsigned int gxio_usb_dev_get_in_bufsize (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context, int ep)
 Get the value of an endpoint's input buffer size register.
void gxio_usb_dev_set_in_bufsize (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context, int ep, unsigned int val)
 Set the value of an endpoint's input buffer size register.
unsigned int gxio_usb_dev_get_in_mpkt_sz (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context, int ep)
 Get the value of an endpoint's input maximum packet size register.
void gxio_usb_dev_set_in_mpkt_sz (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context, int ep, unsigned int val)
 Set the value of an endpoint's input maximum packet size register.
unsigned int gxio_usb_dev_get_out_ctrl (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context, int ep)
 Get the value of an endpoint's output control register.
void gxio_usb_dev_set_out_ctrl (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context, int ep, unsigned int val)
 Set the value of an endpoint's output control register.
unsigned int gxio_usb_dev_get_out_sts (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context, int ep)
 Get the value of an endpoint's output_status register.
void gxio_usb_dev_set_out_sts (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context, int ep, unsigned int val)
 Set the value of an endpoint's output_status register.
unsigned int gxio_usb_dev_get_out_bufsize (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context, int ep)
 Get the value of an endpoint's output buffer size register.
void gxio_usb_dev_set_out_bufsize (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context, int ep, unsigned int val)
 Set the value of an endpoint's output buffer size register.
unsigned int gxio_usb_dev_get_d_cfg (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context)
 Get the value of the device configuration register.
void gxio_usb_dev_set_d_cfg (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context, unsigned int val)
 Set the value of the device configuration register.
unsigned int gxio_usb_dev_get_d_ctrl (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context)
 Get the value of the device control register.
void gxio_usb_dev_set_d_ctrl (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context, unsigned int val)
 Set the value of the device control register.
unsigned int gxio_usb_dev_get_d_sts (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context)
 Get the value of the device status register.
void gxio_usb_dev_set_d_sts (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context, unsigned int val)
 Set the value of the device status register.
unsigned int gxio_usb_dev_get_d_intr (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context)
 Get the value of the device interrupt register.
void gxio_usb_dev_set_d_intr (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context, unsigned int val)
 Set the value of the device interrupt register.
unsigned int gxio_usb_dev_get_d_intr_msk (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context)
 Get the value of the device interrupt mask register.
void gxio_usb_dev_set_d_intr_msk (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context, unsigned int val)
 Set the value of the device interrupt mask register.
unsigned int gxio_usb_dev_get_ep_intr (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context)
 Get the value of the endpoint interrupt register.
void gxio_usb_dev_set_ep_intr (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context, unsigned int val)
 Set the value of the endpoint interrupt register.
unsigned int gxio_usb_dev_get_ep_intr_msk (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context)
 Get the value of the endpoint interrupt mask register.
void gxio_usb_dev_set_ep_intr_msk (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context, unsigned int val)
 Set the value of the endpoint interrupt mask register.
unsigned int gxio_usb_dev_get_udc_ep (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context, int ep)
 Get the value of an physical endpoint's configuration register.
void gxio_usb_dev_set_udc_ep (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context, int ep, unsigned int val)
 Set the value of an physical endpoint's configuration register.
unsigned int gxio_usb_dev_get_udc_vcon (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context)
 Get the value of the ULPI PHY access register.
void gxio_usb_dev_set_udc_vcon (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context, unsigned int val)
 Set the value of the ULPI PHY access register.
int gxio_usb_dev_cfg_interrupt (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context, int target_cpu, int target_event)
 Request USB device interrupts.
int gxio_usb_dev_reset_interrupt (gxio_usb_dev_context_t *context)
 Reset the USB device interrupt, allowing subsequent device interrupts to be delivered.

Detailed Description

An API for manipulating the USB device shim.
